header.title: Git City
header.subtitle: A city of {{count}} GitHub developers. Find yourself.
header.subtitle_fallback: A global city of GitHub developers. Find yourself.

loading.big_profile: This one's a big profile. Hang tight...

error.not_found_desc: Check the spelling — could be a typo. GitHub usernames are case-insensitive.
error.org: "@{{username}}" is an organization, not a person
error.org_desc: Git City is for individual profiles. Try searching for one of its contributors by their personal username.
error.no_activity_desc: Is this you? Open your profile settings, scroll to 'Contributions & activity', and enable 'Include private contributions'. Then search again.
error.rate_limit_desc: You can look up 10 new profiles per hour. Developers already in the city are unlimited.
error.github_rate_limit_desc: Too many requests to GitHub. Try again in a few minutes.
error.timeout_desc: GitHub's API was slow to respond. This usually resolves itself — try again in a moment.
error.network_desc: Check your internet connection and try again.
error.generic_desc: An unexpected error occurred. Try again.

welcome.title: Find your building in the city
